comment: tactical-diplomat bot band for --sim 5000 --policy tactical-pacifist. RE-BASELINED in batch 11 (combat-balance MAJOR). The diplomat awe-becalms ogres by holding adjacent (its cornered-talk is a no-move hold that endures the ogre's hit), which costs HP; under batch 11's heal scarcity, and with NO light payoff for sparing yet, mercy is the HARDER road — win_pct fell 49 -> 27 (1373/5000 = 27.5%), currently BELOW violence (46.8%). This is the PLANNED interim per docs/design/2026-07-22-mercy-economy-arc.md: batch 12's light-as-grace (spare -> light, kill -> dim) is exactly what lifts diplomacy above violence, and the diplomat already banks the fuel for it (62890 spares / 5000 runs). Measured: wins 1373/5000 (27.5%), deaths_combat 3461, deaths_dark 166, stuck 0, kills_total 0 (never attacks). Band brackets the measured value with headroom; batch 12 re-anchors it upward under its own sign-off. Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
